_comment: Loamkit composer fragment — WooCommerce (e-shop) branch. ADDITIVE only: merged on top of the Bedrock composer.json (which already provides roots/wordpress + base packages) — do NOT re-list those here. WordPress plugins use Roots' WP Packages repo (wp-plugin/<slug>), registered in Bedrock by default since WPackagist's 2026 retirement. The WooCommerce pin (10.9.*) reflects June 2026; WooCommerce ships on a ~5-week minor cadence, so review/bump per release rather than tracking @latest. HPOS requires MySQL/MariaDB; never SQLite (see CLAUDE.md / reference/woocommerce.md).
